name: UBL9H
comment: The ADJ Ultra Series has long provided lighting designers and event producers the creativity to create event linear wash lighting for walls, floors and ceilings. The UBL9H incorporates a lime-infused HEX LED with nine (9) 20-Watt (Red, Green, Blue, Amber, Lime and UV) LEDs. The added lime chip offers a higher caliber of color indexing with a high CRI of over 90 along with tunable white light control from 2,300K to 9,900K.
